examples: Kevin said it was a "load of hogwash" that he was not interested in football.
This is, in a word, hogwash.
People talk about how aliens must be coming from other galaxies — that's hogwash!
Whenever you read stories like that on PF blogs, it can feel like touchy-feely academic hogwash.
For one thing, the notion that only women can talk to women is hogwash.
